home.confirmationPlaceholder: Argentina v England world cup match
home.confirmationCopy: I’ll keep an eye on this for you.
home.checkedSummary: I checked {count} things while you were away.
home.controlSummary: Everything else is already under control.
home.flightHeadline: Christmas flights to Barcelona just opened.
home.flightSummary: Prices start at £89 and are rising quickly. The best fares typically sell within 48 hours.
home.phoneHeadline: Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra dropped to €189 on Amazon.
home.phoneSummary: Your target was €200. This is a flash sale — it may not last long.
home.newsHeadline: UK AI Regulation Bill passed its third reading.
home.newsSummary: Royal Assent expected within 2–3 weeks. Q3 2025 compliance deadline is now confirmed.

watches.title: All watches
watches.intro: Review the watch list and open any item for more context.
watches.empty: Everything is under control. No active watches right now.

detail.title: Watch detail
detail.confirmationCopy: I’ll let you know when something important changes.
detail.notFoundCopy: We could not find that watch. Please return to the watch list.

newWatch.heading: What should I keep an eye on?
newWatch.intro: Describe it naturally, or paste a URL to follow a story.
newWatch.label: What should I keep an eye on?
newWatch.whyFollowingPlaceholder: Add a note to help you remember later.
newWatch.urlShortcut: Or paste a URL to follow a story
newWatch.urlHelp: Share any article or page directly from another app.
newWatch.urlDetected: URL detected — this page can be followed as a story.
newWatch.exampleOne: Tell me when EasyJet opens Christmas flights to Barcelona
newWatch.exampleTwo: Let me know when the price falls below €200
newWatch.exampleThree: Watch this trial and tell me when there's a verdict
newWatch.exampleFour: Tell me when Wimbledon tickets go on general sale
newWatch.exampleFive: Follow this story and let me know when something important changes
newWatch.emptyError: Tell me what you would like me to watch.
newWatch.meaningfulError: Please add a little more detail.

watchConfirmation.heading: I'm on it.
watchConfirmation.copy: I'll start watching this immediately and let you know when something matters.

followStory.title: Followed investigation
followStory.intro: A new update is available for your tracked supply chain story.
followStory.understoodCopy: The investigation shows that airport staff shortages are affecting cargo flow for holiday deliveries, which may impact the products you care about.

pendingSituations.release: I’m watching for an official release announcement.
pendingSituations.price: I’m watching for a price update that matches your target.
pendingSituations.travel: I’m watching for an official availability or schedule update.
pendingSituations.news: I’m watching for the next meaningful development.
pendingSituations.event: I’m watching for an official date or availability announcement.
pendingSituations.general: Watching for the first meaningful update.

watch-001.title: EasyJet Christmas flights
watch-001.request: Track EasyJet Christmas flight prices for London to Mallorca
watch-001.summary: Prices rose quickly for your London to Mallorca holiday watch.
watch-001.currentSituation: Christmas flights from London Gatwick to Barcelona opened this morning at 6:14 AM. Prices currently start at £89 each way.
watch-001.recommendation: Book now. Prices on this route typically climb 40–60% within 48 hours of opening. The best seats go first.
watch-001.assistantContext: I’ve been checking three flight sources several times a day since October. This is the moment you were waiting for.
watch-001.whyFollowing: “You mentioned wanting to visit your family in Barcelona over Christmas and asked me to alert you the moment tickets opened so you could book before prices climb.”
watch-001.timelineOne: You asked me to watch for Christmas flights
watch-001.timelineTwo: Winter schedule released — Christmas not yet available

watch-002.title: Amazon price alert
watch-002.request: Let me know when this product drops below €200
watch-002.summary: Wireless headphones dropped below your alert threshold.
watch-002.currentSituation: The monitored product is now priced below your €200 target on Amazon.
watch-002.recommendation: Review the offer soon. Flash-sale pricing can change without notice.
watch-002.assistantContext: I compared the latest Amazon price with the threshold you set and confirmed that it is now below target.
watch-002.whyFollowing: “You asked me to let you know as soon as this product dropped below €200.”
watch-002.timelineTwo: Price update received below your target

watch-003.title: Followed investigation
watch-003.summary: A supply chain story is being tracked for new developments.
watch-003.currentSituation: A new article has added meaningful context to the supply-chain investigation you are following.
watch-003.recommendation: Read the latest report when convenient; no immediate action is required.
watch-003.assistantContext: I’m filtering routine coverage and keeping only developments that materially change the story.
watch-003.whyFollowing: “You asked me to follow this investigation and highlight meaningful developments.”
